title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Spiral Review
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.
Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: loops planning decomposition. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. content.text: A long flat checklist exposes all dependencies. This fails the Dependency Graph contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

stimulus.title: Plan User Choice case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: loops planning decomposition. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: evidence

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Plan User Choice applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Pause for user direction only when missing authority or a choice materially changes the outcome.
